'''Nelia Fry''' was a [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] who was the mother of [[Talesan Fry]]. She was killed by the [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] [[Magus (bounty hunter)|Magus]] along with her husband [[Grove Fry|Grove]].

==Appearances==
*[[Secrets of the Jedi (novel)|''Secrets of the Jedi'']] {{1st}}

==Sources==
